text: Our paper on optically transparent metamaterial was accepted by Advanced Composites and Hybrid Materials.
恭喜苏浩维等获第十四届南京理工大学大学生机械创新设计大赛一等奖，指导老师李大伟。
恭喜孙成涛、廖雯婷获“和平杯”第十一届南京理工大学武器创新设计大赛特等奖，指导老师李大伟。
Our paper on rigid-flexible interlocked metastructures was accepted by Science Advances.
恭喜孙成涛获第三十四届南京理工大学“创新杯”大学生课外学术科技作品竞赛特等奖，指导老师李大伟。
恭喜姜涵文同学被推荐江苏省2025届优秀毕业设计（论文），指导老师李大伟。
恭喜许天琪、刘兴、刘昊洋等同学获第三届特种装备创新设计大赛全国三等奖，指导老师李大伟。
Our paper on the electromagnetic absorption mechanism of TPMS-based metastructures was accepted by Advanced Functional Materials.
Our paper on coding for electromagnetic absorbing metastructure was accepted by Composites Part B: Engineering.
Our paper on 3D reconfigurable electromagnetic wave-absorbing metastructure was accepted by Advanced Materials.
Our paper on AI-aided design and optimization of metastructure for controllable anisotropy was published in Engineering Structures.
Our paper on functionally gradient metastructure for electromagnetic absorption was published in Composites Part B: Engineering.
Our paper on modular electromagnetic absorbing metastructure was published in Composites Part B: Engineering.
Our paper on 3D electromagnetic wave-absorbing metastructure was accepted by Advanced Materials.
Dawei Li joined Nanjing University of Science and Technology as an Assistant Professor.
